description: HAProxy H3/QUIC standalone-FIN body validation bypass allows cross-user HTTP request smuggling via backend connection pool when http-reuse always is configured. One zero-byte QUIC packet desynchronises HAProxy's backend pool and smuggles requests across unrelated users — even users on a different frontend protocol.
note: Not new in the last 24h, but no genuinely new (>= CVSS 7) advisories surfaced in the watchlist window. Surfaced here because PoC + bug-bounty angle remain unexploited at scale.
